title: AI Impact Tracker
description: Title slide — water, energy, and carbon footprint of AI use, framed across the Seven Dimensions of Wellness. v1.4

title: The Invisible Footprint
description: Problem statement — AI's resource cost is hidden; the tracker makes it visible, comparable, and personal.

title: Product Overview
description: System layout — Tool Catalog, My Practice, Practice Receipt, and the transparency pages.

description: The three linked formulas for energy, carbon, and water that share one energy term.

description: Complexity multipliers, grid-intensity figures, live EIA data, and the Li et al. 2023 water factor.

title: Energy in Familiar Terms
description: Student-friendly energy comparisons with device vs data-center split.

title: Seven Dimensions of Wellness
description: The Hettler/NWI wellness frame, with environmental impact as one dimension of seven.

title: The Offset Catalog
description: Dimension-tagged everyday actions, framed as context rather than absolution.

title: Privacy, Limits & Sources
description: Local-only storage, low-precision honesty, and the cited sources.
